---
title: "LGND Science"
subtitle: "Technical posts on geospatial AI, embeddings, and foundation models"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, image]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

We publish technical notes at the intersection of **geospatial AI**, **foundation model embeddings**, and **uncertainty estimation**.

Our core approach: *linear probes on frozen embeddings* — revealing what signals are already linearly accessible in a model's internal representations, without retraining anything.

---
